## Meeting Purpose

[Review the new Notion PM framework and provide client status updates.](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Notion PM Framework:** A new framework in Notion's Strategy Sprint Tracker (SST) automates task creation and centralizes client health tracking to improve visibility and streamline workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**Nat Ricks Publishing Blocked:** Publishing is blocked until Monday due to Ade's absence and outstanding feedback. Kathy will attempt to stage 1–2 articles in the Sanity CMS today.](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
  - [**Elementum Strategy:** The strategy will focus on foundational content and sales enablement, delaying direct competitor comparisons (e.g., vs. ServiceNow) until the client is more established.](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=2964.0)
  - [**Tavis Content Unblocked:** To maintain momentum, the team will select 3 topics for this week's articles if the client does not provide their prioritization today.](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=2629.0)

## Topics

### New Notion PM Framework

  - [**Goal:** Improve visibility and streamline workflows for the fast-paced sprint process.](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**Architecture:** Leverages the existing Strategy Sprint Tracker (SST) database, now connected to a new task database.](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Automated Task Creation:**](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
      - [A "spin up tasks" checkbox on a new SST record automatically generates a full sprint's tasks, assigned by role and week.](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
      - [This replaces manual Linear ticket creation, which was cited as a major pain point.](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [**Centralized Client Health Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [A dedicated section in the SST record provides a single source of truth for client health (Green, Yellow, Red).](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
      - [**EMs:** Own the overall health signal.](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [**MEs:** Provide input on content quality and publishing issues.](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [**Action:** Define clear criteria for Green, Yellow, and Red statuses to ensure consistent, objective reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [**Feedback & Adoption:**](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [The team must use the V1 framework and provide specific feedback to guide future iterations.](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [**Action:** William will create a Loom for the EM workflow; Sydney will create one for the ME workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)

      - [**Action:** Nathalie will refresh the "business process automation" article for delivery by next Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/YqsUyCDNQPn73Cc_dAVgpCzkC-9igndp?tab=summary&timestamp=3024.0)
